title: hieracium substellatum subsp. substellatum
intro: Hieracium substellatum subsp. substellatum, also known as lesser hawkweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium substellatum subsp. substellatum include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds, or taken internally to support immune function.
